title: Output Length Limiter
constraints: You must cap the agent's output to a reasonable length (e.g. 200 words or 800 characters)
The truncation must not cut mid-sentence if possible
The agent should still provide a complete, useful answer within the limit
hints: A post-processing step can truncate or summarize the output after the agent responds
Alternatively, add explicit length instructions to the system prompt
Combining prompt-level guidance with a hard truncation fallback gives the best results

starterCode.langchain:
from langchain_openai import ChatOpenAI
from langchain_core.prompts import ChatPromptTemplate

llm = ChatOpenAI(model="gpt-4o-mini")

# BUG: No length constraints — the agent writes 2000-word essays
prompt = ChatPromptTemplate.from_messages([
    ("system", "You are a helpful assistant. Provide thorough, detailed answers."),
    ("human", "{input}"),
])

chain = prompt | llm

result = chain.invoke({"input": "Explain how neural networks work"})
print(result.content)
print(f"\n--- Output length: {len(result.content.split())} words ---")
starterCode.openai-agents-sdk:
from agents import Agent, Runner

# BUG: No length constraints — the agent writes 2000-word essays
agent = Agent(
    name="Explainer",
    instructions="You are a helpful assistant. Provide thorough, detailed answers.",
)

result = Runner.run_sync(agent, "Explain how neural networks work")
print(result.final_output)
print(f"\n--- Output length: {len(result.final_output.split())} words ---")
starterCode.crewai:
from crewai import Agent, Task, Crew

# BUG: No length constraints — the agent writes 2000-word essays
explainer = Agent(
    role="Explainer",
    goal="Provide thorough, detailed answers to any question",
    backstory="You are a helpful assistant who explains concepts in detail.",
)

task = Task(
    description="Explain how neural networks work",
    expected_output="A thorough explanation of neural networks",
    agent=explainer,
)

crew = Crew(agents=[explainer], tasks=[task])
result = crew.kickoff()
print(result)
print(f"\n--- Output length: {len(str(result).split())} words ---")

evaluationCriteria.label: Output is within length limit
evaluationCriteria.description: The agent's response stays within the configured word or character limit

evaluationCriteria.label: No mid-sentence cutoff
evaluationCriteria.description: If truncation is needed, it ends at a sentence boundary rather than mid-word

evaluationCriteria.label: Response is still useful
evaluationCriteria.description: The shorter response still answers the user's question meaningfully

evaluationCriteria.label: Token usage reduced
evaluationCriteria.description: The output uses significantly fewer tokens than the unconstrained version
